svg.title: Page Object Model Architecture — Full Flow
svg.desc: Diagram showing how export, class, constructor, private, this, new, and import connect test files to page files in POM

g.text: makes class available to other files

svg.text: A — export → share class with other files
B — class → blueprint holding locators + actions
C — private → locator only accessible inside class
D — constructor → runs on 'new', receives page object
E — this.page → refers to current class instance
F — async methods → reusable actions for that page
G — import → bring class into test file
H — new → create instance, trigger constructor
